name: Carrot Souffle
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup crushed corn flakes or walnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. For the topping: Combine crushed corn flakes or walnuts, brown sugar, and butter. Set aside.
3. Puree cooked carrots and eggs in a blender. Add sugar, flour, vanilla, butter, nutmeg, and salt. Blend thoroughly.
4. Pour mixture into a 1 1/2-quart pan or souffle dish.
5. Bake for 40 minutes.
6. Spread topping over the souffle.
7. Bake an additional 5 to 10 minutes, or until topping is lightly browned.
Per serving: 383 calories, 6 gm protein, 46 gm carbohydrates, 20 gm fat, 152 mg cholesterol, 11 gm saturated fat, 177 mg sodium.
